title: galium mollugo var. virgultorum
intro: Galium mollugo var. virgultorum, also known as Wood Avens or Herb Bennet, is a variety of the Galium mollugo plant, a flowering plant native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Galium mollugo var. virgultorum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
